postconditions: target branch contains the WP0 overlay only
no checker, Lean, Coq, or fixture implementation is modified
no tag, GitHub Release, Zenodo publication, or DOI action occurs
required_preconditions: origin/main equals the exact source commit
working tree has no tracked modifications
stable tag v1.3.0 peels to the frozen target
target branch is absent or already points exactly at the source commit
